prose:
**Fukui Reactivity Indices for Aniline** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral parent); cation and anion states computed at multiplicity 2. Geometry: input structure from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`, used as-is (single-point calculation, not optimized). SCF converged for all three electron-count states (neutral, N−1, N+1). Mulliken partial charges used to compute Fukui indices per atom.

**Most electrophilic site:** Carbon atom 3 (ortho/ipso position), f⁺ = 2.298.
**Most nucleophilic site:** Nitrogen atom 1 (amino group), f⁻ = 0.205.

Full Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) reported for all 14 atoms. Charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000, no convergence drift). A Fukui bar chart was generated and saved. These results indicate the expected ortho/para-directing character of the electron-donating amino group, with the ortho carbons showing the strongest electrophilic character and the nitrogen the strongest nucleophilic character.

**Command:** `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp58g84e71/live.json`

**Output files:** Result JSON at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp58g84e71/live.json`; Fukui bar chart at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/argo_claude-haiku-4.5/20260704-174843_aniline_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.</prose>
<parameter name="value">2.298
